description_long: This is a full-sized basketball court featuring a light wood playing surface with prominent blue and yellow accents, representing the Golden State Warriors. The court is bordered by a wide yellow perimeter, with the team name 'Golden State Warriors' and logos clearly visible at both ends and at center court. Two basketball hoops with rectangular glass backboards and blue support structures are positioned at either end of the court. Standard court markings, including the three-point lines, free throw lanes, center circle, and baselines, are clearly delineated in blue. The court appears to be designed for indoor use, with a polished, smooth finish and no visible fencing or enclosure. Sponsorship logos are also present on the court surface, adding to its professional appearance.
description: A professional indoor basketball court with Golden State Warriors branding, blue and yellow accents, and two glass backboard hoops. The court features clear markings and a polished wooden surface.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the court from one end, highlighting the hoop, backboard, and the 'Golden State Warriors' branding along the baseline.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a side perspective, displaying both hoops, the full length of the court, and the central logo.
description_view_2: View 2 mirrors View 0 from the opposite end, focusing on the other hoop and baseline branding.
description_view_3: View 3 offers another side view, similar to View 1, with both hoops and the court's full layout visible.
